title: Debugging Agent Project Scope
concept: Defining the goal: an agent that parses code errors, writes fixes, and runs them in a sandbox.

exercises.prompt: What is the primary goal of the Debugging Agent?

options.text: To parse code errors and write fixes
To create a new programming language

exercises.explain: The primary goal of the Debugging Agent is to scan for code errors and write fixes.

cards.title: What is the Debugging Agent?
cards.body: The Debugging Agent is a special program designed to help find and fix code errors automatically.

cards.title: Agent Project Scope
cards.body: The scope of our project is to create an agent that can parse, write fixes for code errors, and execute them safely in a sandbox environment.

cards.title: Debugging Agent as an Auto-Mechanic
cards.body: Think of the Debugging Agent like an auto-mechanic for code. Just like a mechanic diagnoses and fixes car problems, the agent finds and corrects errors in code.

cards.title: Real-World Application
cards.body: Imagine running a program that automatically fixes mistakes in your homework. The Debugging Agent does this for computer programs!

cards.title: Myth: Debugging is Only for Experts
cards.body: It's a common myth that only experts can debug programs. Our Debugging Agent makes it easier for anyone to fix code errors!

cards.title: Debugging Process Overview
cards.body: The Debugging Agent follows three key steps: Parse errors, Write fixes, Run in a sandbox.

right.text: Test fixes safely in a sandbox

exercises.prompt: What are the three main tasks of the Debugging Agent?

options.text: Parse code, write poetry, run in the cloud
Parse errors, write fixes, run in a sandbox
Write code, design graphics, optimize performance
Teach coding, review projects, manage teams

exercises.explain: The Debugging Agent's main tasks are to parse errors in code, write fixes for those errors, and then safely run those fixes in a sandbox.

exercises.prompt: The Debugging Agent can run code directly on a user’s device.
exercises.explain: The Debugging Agent runs fixes in a sandbox, which means it operates in a safe space, away from the user's device.

exercises.prompt: The goal of our agent is to ______ code errors, write fixes, and run them in a sandbox.
exercises.sentence: The goal of our agent is to parse code errors, write fixes, and run them in a sandbox.
exercises.explain: The correct word is 'parse' since the agent needs to find errors, which is called parsing.

exercises.prompt: Which statement describes the Debugging Agent?

options.text: It can create a new programming language.
It finds code errors and provides solutions.
It only runs code from expert programmers.

exercises.explain: The Debugging Agent's primary function is to find and fix code errors, which makes programming easier for everyone!

exercises.prompt: What is the first step the Debugging Agent takes in analyzing code?
exercises.explain: The first step the Debugging Agent takes is to parse the code for errors. This means it looks through the code to find any mistakes before attempting to fix or run it.
